# High Noise Emitter Visual Matrix

Canonical D2.18 proof scene for noisy illumination around a small bright
emissive object. This scene is intended to show where final-resolve denoise can
trim stable sampling noise without claiming that ordinary emissive-material
surface-hit transport is complete.

Use `request_disney_v2_denoise_off_12.json` and
`request_disney_v2_denoise_on_12.json` for the apples-to-apples comparison.
